accounts.title: Accounts

detail.currencyChangeWarning: Existing transactions will keep their original amounts. You will need to manually correct the balance.

removal.confirm: Archive this account? Its transaction history will be preserved.

accounts.empty: No accounts yet. Tap + to create one.

categories.title: Categories
categories.empty: No categories. Tap the donut chart to switch views, then Edit → + to create one.

removal.confirm: Archive this category? It will remain on historical transactions.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.noExchangeRate: No exchange rate available — using 1:1 conversion.
transactions.staleExchangeRate: Could not fetch exchange rates. Using cached rates.
transactions.deleteConfirm_one: Delete {{count}} transaction? This cannot be undone.
transactions.deleteConfirm_other: Delete {{count}} transactions? This cannot be undone.

debtPayment.label: Debt Payment
debtPayment.noInterestCover: Payment doesn't cover interest — full amount reduces balance
debtPayment.mortgageInfo: ⓘ Regular Payment covers interest + principal. Overpayment goes entirely to principal and shortens your mortgage term.

budget.title: Budget
budget.empty: No budget data for this month.

theme.label: Theme
theme.lightError: The developer dislikes light theme and will never implement it.

notification.label: Daily reminder
notification.caveat: Timing is approximate when the app is closed — the system decides when to deliver background reminders.

mainCurrency.label: Main currency
mainCurrency.changeConfirm: All historical amounts will be recalculated to {{currency}}. This may take a moment.
mainCurrency.missingRates: Cannot change currency: no exchange rate available for {{currencies}}.

backup.label: Backup & Restore
backup.restoreConfirm: This will delete all current data and replace it with the backup. This cannot be undone.
backup.restoreFileConfirm: This will replace all data with the imported file. This cannot be undone.

export.label: Export data
export.complete: Export complete. Your file has been downloaded.

log.label: Logs
log.clearConfirm: This will delete all stored log entries.

welcome.title: Expenses
welcome.subtitle: Your personal finance tracker.
welcome.storageNotice: By using this app, cookies and local storage are used to store your data.

currency.title: Choose your main currency
currency.subtitle: Used for all totals and reports.

account.title: Create your first account
account.subtitle: You can add more accounts later.

categories.title: Choose your categories
categories.subtitle: Select the ones you want to track.

install.title: Install App
install.subtitle: Add to your home screen for the best experience.

errors.sameAccount: Source and destination must be different.
errors.quotaExceeded: Storage full. Export your data and clear old backups.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.integrityBody: Your database appears to be corrupted. Restore from a backup to recover your data.
errors.restoreFailed: Restore failed. Please try a different backup.
